plugins.name: matomo-analytics
plugins.description: Unofficial community plugin for Matomo Analytics. Query visits, page performance, search keywords, traffic sources, and AI assistant referrals directly from Claude.

plugins.name: outlook-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for Microsoft Outlook Legacy on macOS via AppleScript. Search, read, send, reply, forward emails and manage calendar events without API keys or OAuth.

plugins.name: copilot-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for Microsoft 365 Copilot via Playwright browser automation. Query internal corporate data (emails, SharePoint, Teams, meetings).
